name: Weather
description: Current weather + 7-day forecast from OpenWeatherMap (click to open the forecast, air quality & charts window)

city.label: City
city.hint: e.g. Lisbon, Paris, Tokyo, New York. Geocoded by OpenWeatherMap — full city name or 'City, Country' both work. As you type, suggestions appear from the geocoding API.

api_key.label: OpenWeatherMap API key
api_key.hint: DPAPI-encrypted (per-Windows-user) before saving — never stored as plaintext. Get a free key at https://home.openweathermap.org/api_keys

units.label: Units
units.hint: metric = Celsius + m/s. imperial = Fahrenheit + mph.

forecast_days.label: Forecast days
forecast_days.hint: Daily forecast cards shown in the popup (1-7). Default 7 — also the maximum the free tier returns per request.

update_minutes.label: Update interval (minutes)
update_minutes.hint: Minimum 1 minute. Default 30. Each update costs ~3 API calls (geocode once cached, current, daily, air quality). Free tier (One Call by Call) gives 2,000 calls/day; at 30 min that's ~144 calls/day — well within the limit. Below ~10 min may exhaust the daily quota.
